items.definition_en: A concert is a live music performance.
items.example_en: We are going to a concert on Friday.

items.definition_en: A band is a group of people who play music together.
items.example_en: My favorite band is playing tonight.

items.definition_en: A singer is a person who sings songs.
items.example_en: The singer has a beautiful voice.

items.definition_en: The audience is the group of people watching an event.
items.example_en: The audience cheered at the end.

items.definition_en: A stage is the place where performers stand during a show.
items.example_en: The singer walked onto the stage.

items.definition_en: A ticket is a piece of paper or card for entry to an event.
items.example_en: I bought a ticket for the concert.

items.definition_en: A microphone is a device used to make voices louder.
items.example_en: She used a microphone to sing loudly.

items.definition_en: A guitar is a musical instrument with strings.
items.example_en: He played the guitar on stage.

items.definition_en: Drums are musical instruments that make a loud sound when hit.
items.example_en: The drummer played the drums fast.

items.definition_en: A piano is a large musical instrument with keys.
items.example_en: He learned to play the piano at home.

items.definition_en: A musician is a person who plays music.
items.example_en: The musician wrote a new song.

items.definition_en: A song is a piece of music with words.
items.example_en: I like this song very much.

items.definition_en: A festival is a special event with music and fun.
items.example_en: They go to a music festival every year.

items.definition_en: A crowd is a large group of people together.
items.example_en: A big crowd waited outside the venue.

items.definition_en: An album is a collection of songs.
items.example_en: She released a new album last week.

items.definition_en: A fan is a person who likes someone or something a lot.
items.example_en: He is a big fan of rock music.

items.definition_en: A dancer is someone who dances in shows or performances.
items.example_en: The dancer moved across the stage.

items.definition_en: A venue is a place where an event happens.
items.example_en: The concert venue was full of people.

items.definition_en: A ticket stub is the part of a ticket kept after entry.
items.example_en: He saved the ticket stub from the concert.

items.definition_en: A setlist is a list of songs played in a show.
items.example_en: We looked at the setlist before the show started.
